description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named documentation that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job that runs on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.7, checking out the repository, setting up Python, installing dependencies including mkdocs and Pygments, building documentation with mkdocs build, and deploying to a GitHub Pages repository using the github-pages-deploy-action, with separate deployment steps for push and pull request events.
